title: OutputCommitterFactory
description:
The OutputCommitterFactory is the committer factory to register as the source of committers for the job/filesystem schema. It checks the schema of the output path and fails fast if it is not supported. The factory creates a committer instance for the output path and task context.

Output format exactly as:
TITLE: <maximum 10 words>

DESCRIPTION:
<4 to 6 concise sentences>
